## Testing done

How was this verified locally? Include the commands you ran and any relevant output.

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `make test` passes locally (and `make test-cov` if coverage is relevant)
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable (README, docs/, CHANGELOG)
- [ ] No secrets, PDFs, model weights, or `__pycache__` committed
- [ ] Commit messages follow the conventional format (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
